meta.phase-name: Model Schema Popup and Kael Context

phase-plan.purpose: Expose model context directly in the UI so users can see which model schema Kael is using and inspect model feature refs in a dedicated popup.
phase-plan.scope: Space Explorer control panel only: add popup trigger, active Kael model indicator, schema list/inspector.

file.description: Add model schema popup and Kael model inference/selection state.

task.description: Infer current Kael model from runtime model schemas with entity-first fallback.
Add a dedicated Model Schema popup with model selector and feature-ref details.
